name: shopify
description: Manage products, orders, and customers in your Shopify store

envVars.name: SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET
envVars.description: Shopify OAuth Client Secret (API Secret Key)

tools.name: List Products
tools.description: List products in your Shopify store

tools.name: Get Product
tools.description: Get details of a specific product

tools.name: List Orders
tools.description: List orders from your Shopify store

tools.name: Get Order
tools.description: Get details of a specific order

tools.name: List Customers
tools.description: List customers in your Shopify store

prompts.title: Show my products
prompts.prompt: List all products in my Shopify store with their prices and inventory levels.

prompts.title: Show recent orders
prompts.prompt: Show me the most recent orders from my Shopify store with customer details and order totals.

prompts.title: Show my customers
prompts.prompt: List all customers in my Shopify store with their contact information and order history.
